Interface ISegmentGraph2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that define and navigate a topologically structured collection of segments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("8B901909-46BF-4CF6-9D7A-FD0248F734EF")]
public interface ISegmentGraph2 : ISegmentGraph
